blogs.title: Caring for the Skywalker Sound Library and recording Impulse responses – with sound librarian & recordist Kai Paquin
blogs.content: Ben Reichstein’s Field & Foley Podcast – a member of the Audio Podcast Alliance – has shared this interesting new interview with Kai Paquin, sound librarian and recordist at Skywalker Sound, on caring for the studio’s vast sound library and the craft of recording impulse responses: Here’s the official episode description My guest today is […] The post Caring for the Skywalker Sound Library and recording Impulse responses – with sound librarian & recordist Kai Paquin appeared first on A Sound Effect .
